name: AIBOM: components[].mlModel entries include each model id pinned in lock.json.model_pins (e.g. claude-opus-4-7)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro compliance && printf '{"plugin_version":"0.3.0","model_pins":{"reviewer":"claude-opus-4-7","architect":"claude-sonnet-4-6"}}' > .claude-tdd-pro/lock.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/aibom.sh" --tag v0.3.0 --emit compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json && grep "claude-opus-4-7" compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json 1>&2 && grep "claude-sonnet-4-6" compliance/AIBOM-v0.3.0.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
